reviews.comment:

A comfortable place to eat or have a drink and kill some time. The shop employee is super friendly and nice.

reviews.comment:
Soy Socio desde hace más de 20 años, y me he sentido siempre bien respalado con los servicios que brinda él ACA. Y últimamente una mejora sustancial en la atención del personal a cargo de las distintas áreas, éstos actos de mejora te invitan a usar cada vez más los servicios del ACA, SIGAN ASÍ

(Translated by Google)
I've been a member for over 20 years, and I've always felt well supported by the services ACA provides. And lately, there's been a substantial improvement in the service from the staff in charge of the different areas. These improvements encourage me to use ACA services more and more. Keep it up!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205SU0zcDRhbGxXYUdoaE9Ia3pTVVJxY1dJNE5VRRAB

reviews.comment:
Playeros con atención fuera de serie , vale la pena destacarlo, hasta el clima te comentan y mejor que un meteorólogo devtv !!!

(Translated by Google)
Beachgoers with exceptional service, it's worth highlighting, they even tell you the weather and better than a TV meteorologist!!!

reviews.comment:
Baños cerrados de 19 a 8hs te mandan al baño de la cervecería de enfrente.
Sin sistema ,solo en efectivo y no te suman puntos.
De noche para atender así,deberían tener cerrado.

(Translated by Google)
Bathrooms are closed from 7 PM to 8 AM; they send you to the bathroom at the brewery across the street. They have no payment system, only cash, and they don't give you points. They should be closed at night if they're going to be like this.
